To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will involve basic commands such as init, add, and 
commit. Below is the implementation in OCaml.                                   

main.ml                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@                                                                
+open Core                                                                      
+                                                                               
+type status =                                                                  
+  | Untracked of string                                                        
+  | Tracked of { file: string; staged: bool }                                  
+                                                                               
+let init () =                                                                  
+  let dir = ".minigit" in                                                      
+  if Sys.file_exists dir then                                                  
+    failwith "Repository already initialized"                                  
+  else                                                                         
+    Unix.mkdir dir 0o755;                                                      
+    printf "Initialized empty minigit repository.\n"                           
+                                                                               
+let add file =                                                                 
+  let dir = ".minigit" in                                                      
+  let file_path = dir ^ "/" ^ file in                                          
+  if not (Sys.file_exists file) then                                           
+    failwith "File does not exist"                                             
+  else                                                                         
+    let staged_file_path = dir ^ "/staged/" ^ file in                          
+    Unix.mkdir ~perm:0o755 (dir ^ "/staged");                                  
+    Sys.copy file staged_file_path;                                            
+    printf "Added %s to staging area.\n" file                                  
+                                                                               
+let commit message =                                                           
+  let dir = ".minigit" in                                                      
+  if not (Sys.file_exists (dir ^ "/staged")) then                              
+    failwith "No files added to staging area"                                  
+  else                                                                         
+    let commit_dir = dir ^ "/commits/" ^ Uuid.to_string (Uuid.create ()) in    
+    Unix.mkdir ~perm:0o755 commit_dir;                                         
+    Sys.copy_dir (dir ^ "/staged") commit_dir;                                 
+    printf "Committed %s\n" message                                            
+                                                                               
+let status () =                                                                
+  let dir = ".minigit" in                                                      
+  if not (Sys.file_exists dir) then                                            
+    failwith "Not a minigit repository"                                        
+  else                                                                         
+    let files = Sys.ls_dir "." in                                              
+    let statuses = List.map files ~f:(fun file ->                              
+      match file with                                                          
+      | ".minigit" -> Untracked file                                           
+      | _ ->                                                                   
+          if Sys.file_exists (dir ^ "/staged/" ^ file) then                    
+            Tracked { file; staged = true }                                    
+          else                                                                 
+            Tracked { file; staged = false })                                  
+    in                                                                         
+    List.iter statuses ~f:(fun status ->                                       
+      match status with                                                        
+      | Untracked file -> printf "Untracked: %s\n" file                        
+      | Tracked { file; staged } ->                                            
+          if staged then                                                       
+            printf "Staged: %s\n" file                                         
+          else                                                                 
+            printf "Tracked: %s\n" file)                                       
+                                                                               
+let () =                                                                       
+  match Sys.argv with                                                          
+  | [| _; "init" |] -> init ()                                                 
+  | [| _; "add"; file |] -> add file                                           
+  | [| _; "commit"; message |] -> commit message                               
+  | [| _; "status" |] -> status ()                                             
+  | _ -> eprintf "Usage: minigit <command>\n"                                  
                                                                                

Makefile                                                                        

                                                                                
minigit: main.ml                                                                
                                                                                
    ocamlc -o minigit main.ml                                                   
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
clean:                                                                          
                                                                                
    rm -f minigit *.cmi *.cmx *.o                                               
                                                                                

To build and run the program, use the following commands:                       

 1 Build the project:                                                           
                                                                                
                                                                                
   make                                                                         
                                                                                
 2 Run the program:                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
   ./minigit init                                                               
                                                                                
   ./minigit add file.txt                                                       
                                                                                
   ./minigit commit "Initial commit"                                            
                                                                                
   ./minigit status                                                             
                                                                                

This implementation provides a basic version control system with init, add, and 
commit commands. The status command shows the current state of the repository.
